entries.statement: Design, build, and validate clinical trial databases in electronic data capture systems, including CRF specifications, edit check logic, user acceptance testing, and documentation of compliance with study protocol and applicable regulatory requirements.
Author, maintain, and enforce the enterprise data policy library, ensuring policies are current, accessible, enforced, and aligned with regulatory requirements.
Conduct periodic data compliance assessments, documenting findings, evidence, risk ratings, and remediation assignments.
Manage regulatory data reporting obligations, including data submission preparation, accuracy verification, submission execution, and confirmation documentation.
Track data compliance remediation activities, including milestone monitoring, blocker escalation, and closure verification with evidence.

Maintain Records of Processing Activities, including processing purposes, data categories, recipient categories, transfer records, retention periods, and technical and organizational security measures descriptions.

Execute data subject rights requests within regulatory timelines, including identity verification, request scope determination, response preparation, exemption assessment, and fulfillment documentation.

Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory authority guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and recommended responses.

Conduct Transfer Impact Assessments for international data transfers, evaluating destination country legal frameworks against originating jurisdiction requirements and documenting supplementary safeguards where required.

Prepare and submit regulatory filings, registrations, and notifications required by applicable data protection and AI regulations, including processing registrations, DPO appointments, and AI system registrations.
Coordinate regulatory examination responses, including information request fulfillment, examiner access management, findings response preparation, and corrective action plan development.
Conduct AI system risk classification under the EU AI Act, documenting risk category determination, applicable requirements identification, and conformity assessment pathway selection.
Manage the consent lifecycle across organizational systems, including consent collection configuration, preference storage, withdrawal processing, re-consent campaigns, and audit record maintenance.
